items.title: PL referees to issue yellow cards for hair pulling after rule change
items.summary: Referees will now issue yellow cards for hair pulling in the 2026/27 season after a new set of football principles and refereeing points of emphasis were unveiled by the Premier League.

items.title: Five-time Champions League winner EVACUATED from Mexico’s World Cup opener by police amid chaotic scenes
items.summary: REAL MADRID legend Marcelo was EVACUATED after Mexico's World Cup win against South Africa. The Brazilian rocked up at the Azteca stadium to watch the World Cup opener - but was caught up in ugly scenes outside as protesters rioted whilst he tried to make an exit.
